parsed.availability_comment: Available as of the published opening phase; no adverse 2026 PBKS availability news located.
parsed.availability_note: No current injury/suspension report found; he was active for Afghanistan in February 2026 and is listed in PBKS's 2026 squad.
parsed.followup_reason: Need toss-time XIs or stronger pre-match reporting to separate him from PBKS's crowded overseas seam/allround group.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Good fit as a pace-bowling allrounder, but PBKS have multiple overseas pace/allround options.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Competes for four overseas spots with Stoinis, Jansen, Ferguson, Bartlett, Owen, Connolly and Dwarshuis.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: In PBKS squad and a strong seam-allround option, but final XI depends on overseas balance.
